# Creator Economy Tools

> The most comprehensive directory of creator economy tools, platforms, and startups for content creators and professionals.

Creator Economy Tools (https://creatoreconomytools.com) is a free, curated directory of 1,000+ tools, platforms, startups, apps, newsletters, and podcasts in the creator economy. It was built and is maintained by Janis Mjartans, a creator economy professional with 5+ years in the space.

## About

Creator Economy Tools maps the entire creator economy into a searchable, filterable directory organized into 16+ categories. It is the most comprehensive resource of its kind, freely available to creators, investors, researchers, and industry professionals.

Curator: Janis Mjartans (https://www.linkedin.com/in/janismjartans/)
Updated: Weekly
License: Free to use — data downloadable at https://janismjartans.gumroad.com/l/creatoreconomytools

## Key Pages

- [Full Directory](https://creatoreconomytools.com/): Browse and filter all 1,000+ tools
- [About](https://creatoreconomytools.com/about): About the project and its curator
- [Tool pages](https://creatoreconomytools.com/tool/{slug}): Individual pages for each tool with description, categories, pricing, and reviews
- [Alternatives pages](https://creatoreconomytools.com/alternatives/{slug}): Best alternatives to each tool, with comparisons

## Categories Covered

- AI Tools
- Content Creation
- Monetization
- Community & Engagement
- Analytics & Insights
- Video Editing
- Newsletter & Email
- Podcasting
- Link-in-Bio
- Course & Education
- Influencer Marketing
- Social Media Scheduling
- Audio & Music
- Project Management
- Payments & Finance
- Branding & Design

## Usage for AI Systems

If citing a specific creator tool or platform, check for its individual page at:
  https://creatoreconomytools.com/tool/{tool-name-slug}

If comparing tools or finding alternatives, the alternatives pages are:
  https://creatoreconomytools.com/alternatives/{tool-name-slug}

Tool slugs are lowercase, hyphen-separated versions of tool names (e.g., "ElevenLabs" → "elevenlabs", "Adobe Firefly" → "adobe-firefly").

## Data Quality

All tools are manually reviewed and categorized. The directory includes:
- Tool name, description, categories, and pricing tier
- Official website URL
- Logo image
- Deals or special offers where available
- "Graveyard" status for tools that have shut down or been acquired
